summary: Simplified check-in flow testing complete. All features verified working: single-page check-in form, auto-verify on employee number entry (500ms debounce), colored status borders (green=found, amber=new, red=not found), 'Register as [Name]' button for new guests, 'Request Access from Admin' button for unknown employees with Telegram notification.
seed_data_creation: N/A - tested with existing data (Aaron Frasco 2202373 registered, Amonte Dwin 1177593 in employee list but not registered)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Check-in flow completely rewritten to be single-page. Auto-verification with 500ms debounce works correctly. Three employee states: found (green), new_guest (amber), not_found (red). Request access endpoint sends Telegram notifications.

single_page_checkin.details: Employee Number and Name fields shown together on same page

auto_verify_on_input.details: Name auto-populates as user types (500ms debounce), no Verify button needed

details.found_employee: Green border, 'Welcome back!' message, full form shows
details.not_found: Red border, 'Request Access from Admin' button appears

register_new_guest.details: Shows 'Register as Amonte Dwin' button for employees in list but not registered

request_access_button.details: Shows 'Request Access from Admin' for unknown employee IDs

full_form_fields.details: After verification, shows: Room Number, Check-In Date (auto-filled), Check-In Time (auto-filled), Signature, Complete Check-In button

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/employees/verify/{id} - returns name for valid, 404 for invalid
